free_text: (p,4He) elastic scattering at 350, 650,
1050 and 1150 MeV
4He target has a thickness of 18 mm, with window
of 60 x 40 mm2. A thermal shield made of 15 mu-m thick
aluminium foil cooled by liquid 4He surrounded the
target cell.
SPES I
The beam intensity was monitored by a secondary
emission monitor. A telescope consisting of six
scintillators viewing particles scattered by the target
at a fixed angle, provided an inependent check of the
beam flux impinging the target.
Glauber approximation
The absolute calibration of the secondary
emission monitor, based on the 12C(p,pn)HC reaction
was determined with an accuracy of+-8%.
Digitizing error. The ordinate's scale not
only logarithmic, but there are the error in the
distance between scale marks. The curves were digitized
twice: once in Japan (they used scale as it is) and
second in NDS (they shifted two lower marks in such
way that the distance between them (0.01-0.1,
0.1-1.) became the same as they it pointed for
digitized at NDS
Data scanned from Fig.1, p222 in reference.
Data points in low -t region are too dense to
digitize each point accurately.
On (JCPRG)
Last compilation in NDS

the uncertainties in the target thickness
and beam intensity is not included.
